title: Junior Business Development Manager at Vascon Engineers

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Vascon Engineers
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Vascon Engineers. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Patna-based team.

About Vascon Engineers:
Vascon Engineers is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vascon Engineers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
